title: Rocket Date Night
description: A spicy and juicy dish perfect for a romantic date night, featuring rocket (arugula) in a low-sodium friendly recipe.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef or Turkey
ingredients.notes: Minced for a more authentic texture

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: For added flavor without additional sodium

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: To sauté the ground meat and vegetables

instructions: Saute onion in olive oil until translucent.
Add finely chopped bell pepper and continue to sauté for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in ground beef or turkey and cook until no longer pink. Drain any excess fat if necessary.
Mix in garlic powder and sweet chili sauce. Cook for an additional minute, ensuring everything is evenly coated.
Add arugula to the skillet and toss gently with a splash of olive oil to help it wilt slightly but retain its texture.
Season with low-sodium soy sauce as needed for extra depth.
Serve hot over cooked rice or noodles.
